Whenever you are inflicted with a debuff or have a Status/Curse card added to your deck, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card. ([blue]{TriggersLeft}[/blue] triggers left this turn.)

Whenever you are inflicted with a debuff or have a Status/Curse card added to your deck, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]1[/blue] card. ([blue]{TriggersLeft}[/blue] triggers left this turn.)
MYSTS2MOD-CORE_EXTRACTION_POWER.title: Core Extraction
MYSTS2MOD-CORE_EXTRACTION_POWER.descript: At the start of your next turn, add a random Attack of the same rarity to your hand. It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
MYSTS2MOD-CORE_EXTRACTION_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your next turn, add a random Attack of the same rarity to your hand. It costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.title: Forge Guard
MYSTS2MOD-FORGE_GUARD_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you [gold]Forge[/gold], gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the forged amount × [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
MYSTS2MOD-STRATEGIC_RESERVE_POWER.title: Strategic Reserve
MYSTS2MOD-STRATEGIC_RESERVE_POWER.descri: Next turn, the retained card costs [blue]1[/blue] less energy.
MYSTS2MOD-STRATEGIC_RESERVE_POWER.smartD: Next turn, the retained card costs [blue]1[/blue] less energy.
MYSTS2MOD-EMERGENCY_EXTRACTION_POWER.des: At the end of your turn, if you did not play the extracted card, take [blue]5[/blue] damage.
MYSTS2MOD-EMERGENCY_EXTRACTION_POWER.sma: At the end of your turn, if you did not play the extracted card, take [blue]5[/blue] damage.
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.title: Astral Direct Link
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.descr: Whenever you play a [blue]0[/blue]-cost card, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Every third [blue]0[/blue]-cost card played in a turn grants [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ASTRAL_DIRECT_LINK_POWER.smart: Whenever you play a [blue]0[/blue]-cost card, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold]. Every third [blue]0[/blue]-cost card played in a turn grants [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ENERGY_DOWN_NEXT_TURN_POWER.de: At the start of your next turn, lose [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-ENERGY_DOWN_NEXT_TURN_POWER.sm: At the start of your next turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
MYSTS2MOD-SCRAP_ARTILLERY_POWER.title: Scrap Artillery
MYSTS2MOD-SCRAP_ARTILLERY_POWER.descript: Whenever you draw a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card, deal damage to all enemies [blue]2[/blue] times.
MYSTS2MOD-SCRAP_ARTILLERY_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you draw a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to all enemies [blue]2[/blue] times.
MYSTS2MOD-WASTELAND_FURNACE_POWER.title: Wasteland Furnace
MYSTS2MOD-WASTELAND_FURNACE_POWER.descri: Whenever a [gold]Debris[/gold] or Status card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], [gold]Forge[/gold] [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] {singleStarIcon}, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold], and draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
